seo.title: Maintenance & Specialty Services | Jal Agritech
seo.description: AMC, on-call repairs, landscape upkeep, drainage and lighting maintenance — keeping your irrigation systems and landscapes healthy year-round.
seo.keywords: maintenance, AMC, landscape maintenance, irrigation upkeep, drainage, grading, landscape lighting, on-call repairs, jal agritech

statistics.headline: Maintenance Built Around Your Schedule.
statistics.description: We keep your irrigation systems and landscapes healthy through scheduled servicing, fast-response repairs, and full seasonal care — so you never lose a season to downtime.

stats.description: Service visits per year per site.

topics.title: Annual Maintenance Contracts (AMC)
intro: Comprehensive AMC packages cover scheduled servicing, replacement of consumables, and priority emergency response. We tailor the plan to the system size, climate, and crop cycle — so the contract pays for itself through avoided downtime and longer system life.
topics.highlight: 98% first-visit fix rate across active AMC sites — the contract pays for itself through avoided downtime.

sections.title: What an AMC Covers
list: Scheduled servicing of pumps, controllers, valves, and filters
Priority emergency response within agreed SLA
Annual system health audit + performance report

topics.title: On-Call Repairs
intro: Pay-per-visit emergency service for non-AMC clients with same-day response in Kutch and next-day response across major Gujarat districts. Common call-outs include pump failures, controller resets, leak repair, and storm-damage recovery.

topics.title: General Landscape Maintenance
intro: Routine garden care that keeps soft and hard landscapes looking sharp and operating safely throughout the year. Our crews handle the seasonal cycle from spring cleanup to monsoon prep to winter trim-back.
topics.highlight: Seasonal clean-up, mulching, trimming, leaf removal, and routine garden care — handled on a fixed monthly schedule.

sections.title: Included Maintenance Tasks
list: Mulching for moisture retention and weed control
Routine garden care and plant health checks

topics.title: Drainage & Grading
intro: Land levelling and drainage system installation prevent waterlogging and soil erosion — issues that quietly destroy landscapes and irrigation networks if left unaddressed. We design grading and sub-surface drainage that work in combination with the planting plan.

topics.title: Landscape Lighting Maintenance
intro: Outdoor lighting needs more attention than indoor fixtures — UV exposure, monsoon ingress, and insect debris all shorten driver life. Our maintenance plan covers cleaning, lamp replacement, driver swaps, and seasonal re-aiming for path and accent lights.

sections.title: Maintenance Scope for Outdoor Lighting
list: Quarterly cleaning of lenses and reflectors
Lamp and LED replacement on schedule
Seasonal re-aiming for path and accent lights
